input.headline: All you need to know: Ireland's World Cup play-off draw

raw.headline: All you need to know: Ireland's World Cup play-off draw

winner: Ireland drew the World Cup play-off draw, so now they're just trying to draw the rest of us in—turns out they've got all the moves, but none on the field!

candidates.text: Why did the Irish soccer team bring a ladder to the World Cup play-off? Because they heard the match was a *draw*!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 9.0, "reason": "Puns on 'draw' (both a piece of equipment and the result of a match), is concise, surprising, specific to the headline, and naturally funny."}

candidates.text: Why did Ireland bring a ladder to their World Cup play-off? Because they wanted to reach new heights—literally!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the 'reach new heights' pun, but the connection to the ladder and World Cup play-off feels a bit forced and lacks specificity to the context of Ireland's actual situation."}

candidates.text: Ireland’s World Cup play-off draw was so competitive, they had to use a blindfolded leprechaun with a bouncy castle and a coin for tiebreakers.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative and specific imagery with a touch of Irish humor; slightly long but highly surprising and funny."}

candidates.text: Ireland drew the World Cup play-off draw, so now they're just trying to draw the rest of us in—turns out they've got all the moves, but none on the field!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with a play on 'draw' meaning both the match outcome and Ireland's ability to attract attention. It’s concise and has a good punchline, though the surprise element could be stronger."}

candidates.text: Ireland’s World Cup play-off draw was simple: they had to beat someone. No pressure.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise and uses a play on the phrase 'All you need to know,' but the humor relies slightly on a generic sports trope rather than a specific, surprising twist."}
